gameFeature.title: Exquisite Fishing Gameplay

exquisiteFishingBeginnerGuide.title: Exquisite Fishing Beginner Guide
exquisiteFishingBeginnerGuide.subtitle: Learn the core fishing loop, earn your first gold, and prepare to leave the Calm Ocean.
exquisiteFishingBeginnerGuide.intro: Exquisite Fishing begins in the Calm Ocean with the free Regular Old Boat. Catch and sell fish, then spend your gold on the exact hook, gift, and boat combinations required to reach deeper targets and new ocean areas.

steps.title: Enter the Calm Ocean
steps.details: Select the Regular Old Boat and begin in the Calm Ocean. This starting area costs 0g and contains documented targets between 50m and 300m.
steps.goal: Practice fishing without spending gold on another ocean.

steps.title: Cast and Guide the Lure
steps.details: Throw the lure into the water and guide it toward the depth and target you want. Position the lure close enough for the creature to become interested before beginning the catch.
steps.goal: Avoid wasting a cast on targets that do not match your equipped hook and gift.

steps.title: Fill the Hook Meter
steps.details: Keep the target engaged until the hook meter is filled. After the catch is secured, reel the line back to the surface to complete the attempt.
steps.goal: Complete the full catch before changing equipment or leaving the ocean.

steps.title: Sell Catches for Gold
steps.details: Sell ordinary fish and valuable special catches through the game economy. Gold is used to purchase hooks, gifts, boats, and access to later ocean areas.
steps.goal: Keep building gold instead of repeatedly attempting an unavailable target.

steps.title: Target the Calm Ocean Creatures
steps.details: The Mermaid appears at 50m and is worth 300g with a Diamond Ring and Regular Hook. The Shark appears at 200m and is worth 2,000g with a Good Hook and Striped Pantie, while the Angler appears at 300m and is worth 10,000g with a Box of Chocolates and Regular Hook.
steps.goal: Use the Mermaid as the first simple special target, then prepare the required combinations for the Shark and Angler.

steps.title: Unlock the Rocky Ocean
steps.details: Save 1,500g for the Regular Boat and Rocky Ocean access. Before moving on, check the Fishipedia and Fish Report to review discovered catches and identify missing entries.
steps.goal: Enter the second ocean with enough gold left for its target-specific hooks and gifts.

exquisiteFishingCompleteWalkthrough.title: Exquisite Fishing Complete Walkthrough
exquisiteFishingCompleteWalkthrough.subtitle: Follow the ocean unlock order, prepare each required equipment combination, and reserve enough gold for later boats.
exquisiteFishingCompleteWalkthrough.intro: The main progression route covers four ocean areas with increasingly deep and valuable catches. Each stage below lists the documented access requirement, important targets, and the equipment combinations needed to continue.

stages.progressionGoal: Earn at least 1,500g for the Regular Boat while collecting the equipment needed for the Rocky Ocean.
Prioritize the higher-value Kappa and Angler combinations, then reserve 5,000g for the Reinforced Boat.
Use the 24,000g Shark as the main money target and retrieve Grandpa's Letter before purchasing the Golden Boat.
Upgrade through the documented hook requirements and finish with the 2,000m Angler, the deepest and highest-value listed catch.

exquisiteFishingFishAndCreatures.title: Exquisite Fishing Fish and Creatures List
exquisiteFishingFishAndCreatures.subtitle: Compare documented special catches across all four ocean areas and prepare the correct equipment before casting.
exquisiteFishingFishAndCreatures.intro: This catch table covers the progression-critical creatures and collectible documented across the Calm, Rocky, Turbulent, and Dark oceans. Use the ocean, depth, value, hook, and gift fields to plan each fishing trip.

exquisiteFishingGearAndUpgrades.title: Exquisite Fishing Gear and Upgrade Guide
exquisiteFishingGearAndUpgrades.subtitle: See which equipment unlocks each ocean and which hook-and-gift combinations are required for important catches.
exquisiteFishingGearAndUpgrades.intro: Equipment progression is driven by ocean access and target requirements. Boats open new areas, hooks support increasingly deep catches, and gifts attract specific special creatures.

items.documentedUse: Accesses the Calm Ocean.
Accesses the Rocky Ocean.
Accesses the Turbulent Ocean.
items.knownTargets: Whale, Mermaid, Kappa, Octopus, Shark, and Grandpa's Letter

items.documentedUse: Accesses the Dark Ocean.
items.knownTargets: Special catches from 50m down to the 2,000m Angler

exquisiteFishingOceanBiomes.title: Exquisite Fishing Ocean Biomes and Depths Guide
exquisiteFishingOceanBiomes.subtitle: Explore all four fishing areas, from the free Calm Ocean to the 2,000-meter depths of the Dark Ocean. Check the required boat, entry cost and major catches before starting each trip.
exquisiteFishingOceanBiomes.intro: Exquisite Fishing contains four progressively harder ocean biomes. New areas require stronger boats and increasingly specialized hooks and gifts, while deeper targets provide much larger gold rewards.

biomes.name: Calm Ocean
biomes.importantUnlock: The 300m Angler is the strongest early-game gold target.

biomes.name: Rocky Ocean
biomes.importantUnlock: Reaching 600m opens the biome's highest-value special catch.

biomes.name: Turbulent Ocean
biomes.importantUnlock: Grandpa's Letter is found at 1,000m, while the 900m Shark is the main gold target.

biomes.name: Dark Ocean
biomes.importantUnlock: The 2,000m Angler is the deepest and most valuable listed special catch.

exquisiteFishingBaitsAndCatches.title: Exquisite Fishing Baits and Catch Requirements
exquisiteFishingBaitsAndCatches.subtitle: Match the correct hook and attraction item before casting. Each creature can require a different loadout when it appears in a deeper ocean.
exquisiteFishingBaitsAndCatches.intro: Special creatures only appear when the correct equipment combination is used at the required depth. The same creature may return in later biomes with a stronger hook, a different gift and a much higher sale value.

exquisiteFishingMoneyAndShop.title: Exquisite Fishing Money and Shop Guide
exquisiteFishingMoneyAndShop.subtitle: Build gold by targeting valuable special catches and purchasing only the equipment needed for the next progression gate. Save for boats before buying optional loadouts that do not advance your route.
exquisiteFishingMoneyAndShop.intro: Fish can be sold for gold, which is then used for hooks, gifts, boats and other shop items. A focused route prevents expensive equipment from delaying access to the next ocean biome.

steps.title: Start with the Calm Ocean Mermaid
steps.goal: Create a small starting fund without paying an ocean entry fee.
steps.strategy: Use the free Calm Ocean to learn the casting and reeling loop before committing gold to stronger equipment.

steps.title: Upgrade for the Calm Ocean Shark
steps.goal: Earn enough gold for the first major shop purchases.
steps.strategy: The Shark pays substantially more than the Mermaid and prepares the account for deeper catches.

steps.title: Farm the Early Angler
steps.goal: Build the main bankroll for Rocky Ocean equipment and entry costs.
steps.strategy: The Calm Ocean Angler is the highest-value special catch in the starting biome and uses the basic Regular Hook.

steps.title: Enter Rocky Ocean and Climb to 600m
steps.goal: Unlock a sequence of increasingly valuable catches.
steps.strategy: Prioritize equipment that unlocks more than one target, especially the Reinforced Hook.

steps.title: Save for the Reinforced Boat
steps.goal: Access Turbulent Ocean without draining the upgrade fund.
steps.strategy: The 900m Shark provides the best listed gold payout in this biome. Continue to 1,000m for the story item after securing the required depth.

steps.title: Buy the Golden Boat and Scale Dark Ocean
steps.goal: Reach the late-game catches worth 25,000g to 45,000g.
steps.strategy: Buy late-game hooks in depth order and reuse gifts already purchased in earlier oceans whenever the required combination allows it.

exquisiteFishingAllScenes.title: Exquisite Fishing All Scenes and Gallery Unlocks
exquisiteFishingAllScenes.subtitle: Complete the gallery with an ocean-by-ocean checklist of creatures, depths and required equipment. Every entry is grouped by biome so missing unlocks can be found quickly.
exquisiteFishingAllScenes.intro: Each optional scene is tied to a specific special creature and equipment combination. Equip the listed hook and gift, travel to the correct ocean, lower the line to the required depth and successfully reel in the target.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Exquisite Fishing

questions.question: Is Exquisite Fishing a singleplayer game?
questions.answer: Yes. Exquisite Fishing is a singleplayer Windows PC game available on Steam and itch.io, with no multiplayer or co-op.

questions.question: How much does Exquisite Fishing cost?
questions.answer: Exquisite Fishing has a base price of $4.99 on Steam. It is an adults-only pixel fishing adventure developed by PinkySoul.

questions.question: What platforms support Exquisite Fishing?
questions.answer: Exquisite Fishing is a Windows PC game on Steam. The same build is also listed on itch.io by developer PinkySoul.

questions.question: Does Exquisite Fishing have redeem codes?
questions.answer: No. Exquisite Fishing does not use a code redemption system. Progress comes from catching fish, selling them for gold, and buying hooks, gifts, and boats.

questions.question: How many ocean biomes are in Exquisite Fishing?
questions.answer: Exquisite Fishing has four ocean biomes: Calm Ocean, Rocky Ocean, Turbulent Ocean, and Dark Ocean. Each one requires a stronger boat to access.

questions.question: Where is the Exquisite Fishing save file located?
questions.answer: Exquisite Fishing saves to AppData/LocalLow/PinkySoul/Exquisite Fishing on Windows. Back up this folder to keep your Fishipedia and gallery progress.
